name: Daniel Copley
headline: Engineer. Tinkerer. Coffee enthusiast.
bio: Hi — I'm Daniel. I build software for a living and for fun. I care about elegant systems, sharp tools, and shipping things that work.
When I'm not in front of a terminal I'm usually reading, brewing pour-over, or chasing some side project that's gotten out of hand.
This site is my front porch. Welcome.
